name: NCAAB Men's Tournament Prediction Pipeline
description: BartTorvik AdjEM → injury adjustments → ensemble WP → Monte Carlo → Kelly signals

stages.name: data_ingestion
stages.description: Fetch BartTorvik AdjEM + Pinnacle market lines concurrently

stages.name: injury_adjustment
stages.description: Apply known injury AdjEM deltas on top of Torvik baseline

stages.name: win_probability
stages.description: Build NxN WP matrix: 65% Pinnacle + 35% Torvik when lines available

stages.name: monte_carlo
stages.description: 250k vectorized numpy simulations → per-team round probabilities

stages.name: kelly_sizing
stages.description: Compute half-Kelly fractions for any available betting lines

stages.name: output
stages.description: Write results JSON + betting signals + ntfy alert if edge > 3%
